## IOMarketCategoryMetadata variable

IO validation of Market Categories using superstruct

**Signature:**

```typescript
IOMarketCategoryMetadata: import("superstruct").Struct<{
    name: string;
    img?: string | undefined;
    ticker?: string | undefined;
    color?: string | undefined;
}, {
    name: import("superstruct").Struct<string, null>;
    ticker: import("superstruct").Struct<string | undefined, null>;
    img: import("superstruct").Struct<string | undefined, null>;
    color: import("superstruct").Struct<string | undefined, null>;
}>
```
